ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Canada AQHI CloudEvents on the `canada-aqhi` topic keyed by `{province}/{community_name}`.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for canada-aqhi CloudEvents using the documented Unified Namespace topic hierarchy.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for canada-aqhi CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Community.name: Community
ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Community.description: Reference data for a Canadian Air Quality Health Index reporting community, including its stable CGNDB identifier and current upstream feed URLs.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Observation.name: Observation
ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Observation.description: Latest AQHI observation for a reporting community. Observations are published hourly and may include decimal AQHI values.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Forecast.name: Forecast
ca.gc.weather.aqhi.Forecast.description: Public AQHI forecast for one of the four standard Canadian forecast periods published for an AQHI community.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.description: Events from Canada AQHI covering Canadian Air Quality Health Index communities. Reference records identify stations, sites, or areas; measurement and forecast records carry the current source data.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of ca.gc.weather.aqhi events with subscriber-friendly UNS topics.

ca.gc.weather.aqhi.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of ca.gc.weather.aqhi events for generic brokers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Routing attribute `province` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

community_name.description: Routing attribute `community_name` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Routing attribute `province` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

community_name.description: Routing attribute `community_name` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Routing attribute `province` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

community_name.description: Routing attribute `community_name` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

Community.name: Community
Community.description: Reference data for a Canadian Air Quality Health Index reporting community, including its stable CGNDB identifier and current upstream feed URLs.

province.description: Two-letter Canadian province or territory abbreviation resolved for the AQHI community.

community_name.description: English AQHI community name as published by Environment and Climate Change Canada.

cgndb_code.description: Five-character CGNDB community identifier published by Natural Resources Canada and referenced by ECCC AQHI feeds.

latitude.description: Latitude of the AQHI community reference point in WGS84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Longitude of the AQHI community reference point in WGS84 decimal degrees.

observation_url.description: Current XML observation feed URL for the AQHI community, or null when observations are not distributed for that community.

forecast_url.description: Current XML forecast feed URL for the AQHI community, or null when a public forecast feed is not available.

Observation.name: Observation
Observation.description: Latest AQHI observation for a reporting community. Observations are published hourly and may include decimal AQHI values.

province.description: Two-letter Canadian province or territory abbreviation resolved for the AQHI community.

community_name.description: English AQHI community name as published by Environment and Climate Change Canada.

cgndb_code.description: Five-character CGNDB community identifier published by Natural Resources Canada and referenced by ECCC AQHI feeds.

observation_datetime.description: UTC timestamp of the AQHI observation in ISO 8601 format.

aqhi.description: Observed AQHI value for the community. Observation feeds publish AQHI with decimal precision.

aqhi_category.description: Public AQHI health-risk category derived from the AQHI value.

Forecast.name: Forecast
Forecast.description: Public AQHI forecast for one of the four standard Canadian forecast periods published for an AQHI community.

province.description: Two-letter Canadian province or territory abbreviation resolved for the AQHI community.

community_name.description: English AQHI community name as published by Environment and Climate Change Canada.

cgndb_code.description: Five-character CGNDB community identifier published by Natural Resources Canada and referenced by ECCC AQHI feeds.

publication_datetime.description: UTC timestamp at which the public AQHI forecast bulletin was issued.

forecast_date.description: Forecast target date expressed as YYYYMMDD. Periods 1 and 2 use the bulletin issue date; periods 3 and 4 use the following day.

forecast_period.description: AQHI public forecast period number: 1 Today, 2 Tonight, 3 Tomorrow, 4 Tomorrow Night.

forecast_period_label.description: English public label for the AQHI forecast period.

aqhi.description: Forecast AQHI value for the forecast period. Public forecasts are published as whole numbers.

aqhi_category.description: Public AQHI health-risk category derived from the forecast AQHI value.

schema.description: Forecast payload for air-quality health index observations and forecasts in the Canada AQHI source.

description: Canada AQHI publishes air-quality health index observations and forecasts from Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) for Canadian Air Quality Health Index communities. These events help consumers build monitoring, alerting, analytics, and dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Canada AQHI, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
